walkthrough.fahh.title: Get Started with Fahh
walkthrough.fahh.description: Configure Fahh to play sounds on failures
walkthrough.fahh.step1.title: Test the Sound
walkthrough.fahh.step1.description: Run the 'Play Test Sound' command to verify audio is working.
walkthrough.fahh.step2.title: Choose Your Sound
walkthrough.fahh.step2.description: Pick from built-in sound packs or select your own custom sound.
walkthrough.fahh.step3.title: Configure Settings
walkthrough.fahh.step3.description: Adjust volume, quiet hours, and which events trigger sounds.
config.fahh.title: Fahh
config.fahh.enabled: Master switch for Fahh. When disabled, no sounds or notifications are produced.
config.fahh.soundPath: Absolute path to a custom sound file (.mp3 / .wav / .ogg / .flac). Leave empty to use bundled sound or per-source sounds.
config.fahh.soundFolder: Absolute path to a folder containing sound files. A random file is selected for each failure.
config.fahh.sounds.task: Per-source: sound file for VS Code task failures. Falls back to soundPath if empty.
config.fahh.sounds.shell: Per-source: sound file for terminal shell command failures.
config.fahh.sounds.terminal: Per-source: sound file for terminal session exits.
config.fahh.sounds.test: Per-source: sound file for test failures.
config.fahh.sounds.debug: Per-source: sound file for debug session crashes.
config.fahh.sounds.diagnostics: Per-source: sound file for diagnostics (lint/build errors).
config.fahh.sounds.build: Per-source: sound file for build task failures specifically.
config.fahh.successEnabled: Play a sound on successful build/test completion.
config.fahh.volumeCurve: Volume curve: linear or logarithmic (log feels more natural).
config.fahh.showNotification: Show a notification toast when a failure is detected.
config.fahh.notificationLevel: Notification severity: info, warning, error, or none.
config.fahh.sources: Which failure sources to listen to. Add 'test', 'debug', 'diagnostics', 'build', 'longTask' for more.
config.fahh.sources.shell: Shell commands inside the integrated terminal.
config.fahh.sources.terminal: Terminal sessions exiting with non-zero code.
config.fahh.sources.test: Test failures detected via VS Code test API.
config.fahh.sources.longTask: Tasks running longer than threshold, completed.
config.fahh.cooldownMs: Minimum time (ms) between two consecutive sounds.
config.fahh.maxPerMinute: Hard cap on sounds per minute (0 = unlimited).
config.fahh.ignorePatterns: Regular expressions; matching failure labels are suppressed silently.
config.fahh.showStatusBar: Show the Fahh status bar item.
config.fahh.statusBarCounter: Show today's failure count in status bar.
config.fahh.flashStatusBar: Flash status bar red while a sound is playing.
config.fahh.quietHours.enabled: Enable quiet hours (no sounds during specified times).
config.fahh.muteWhenFocused: Mute sounds when VS Code window is focused (you can see the failure).
config.fahh.snoozeMinutes: Default snooze duration in minutes for the Snooze command.
config.fahh.diagnosticsThreshold: Number of new errors required to trigger diagnostics sound.
config.fahh.logLevel: Output channel verbosity: off, error, warn, info, debug.
config.fahh.historyMax: Maximum number of failure events to keep in history.
config.fahh.speakLabel: Use OS text-to-speech to speak the failure label (Win: SAPI, Mac: say, Linux: espeak).
config.fahh.webhookUrl: Webhook URL to POST failure events as JSON (empty = disabled).
config.fahh.aiSummary.enabled: Use VS Code Language Model API to summarize failures (requires Copilot or equivalent).
config.fahh.dailySummary: Show a daily summary notification at 18:00 with failure count.
config.fahh.streakCounter: Track and announce consecutive successful builds/tests.
config.fahh.bossFightMode: Enable boss-fight HP bar that drops on each failure.
